title: abies apollinis var. reginae-amaliae
intro: Abies apollinis var. reginae-amaliae, also known as the Regine-Amalia fir, is a variant of the Atlas cedar tree native to Greece. This tree is valued for its essential oils, which contain pinene and other compounds with medicinal properties. The essential oil extracted from the Regine-Amalia fir has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing respiratory issues and treating wounds. Herbal preparations of Abies apollinis var. reginae-amaliae include essential oil diffusers, topical applications, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
